name: Chicken with Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: 6 Broiler-fryer chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
4 oz can Diced green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pineapple salsa by mixing together in a small bowl: cilantro, ginger root, 1/8 teaspoon salt, tomato, pineapple, onion, and diced green chilies. Stir in lemon juice.
2. Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat. Add chicken breasts and sprinkle with remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt.
3. Cook the chicken, turning occasionally, for about 6 minutes or until it is lightly browned on all sides.
4. Lower the heat to medium-low and cook for another 5 minutes, or until a fork can be easily inserted into the chicken.
5. Arrange the cooked chicken on a serving platter and spoon the pineapple salsa over top.
6. Garnish with sprigs of cilantro.
Serves 6.
